settings.title: The Revomotive blog.
settings.lead: Guides, product deep-dives, and detailing science — written for owners who care about the finish.

posts.title: How to clay bar your car without leaving scratches
posts.excerpt: Clay bar is the step most people skip. Here's why it matters and how to do it without marring your paint.

posts.title: Ceramic spray vs. ceramic coating: what's the real difference?
posts.excerpt: Short version: ceramic coating is a professional-grade multi-layer film. Ceramic spray is a monthly topcoat. Both have a place.

posts.title: The 30-minute weekend wash routine
posts.excerpt: Consistent maintenance beats one-off deep cleans. This routine takes 30 minutes and extends your coating life significantly.

posts.title: What pH actually means for your car's paint
posts.excerpt: Detailing brands love throwing 'pH-neutral' on labels. Here's what the number actually tells you about safety and effectiveness.

posts.title: Interior detailing on a budget: what to buy first
posts.excerpt: You don't need a full kit to get a clean interior. Start with these three products and build from there.

posts.title: Iron remover: the invisible contamination you're missing
posts.excerpt: Brake dust embeds in clear coat and causes long-term paint damage. Iron remover is cheap, easy, and most people skip it.
